zh.lifeSummary: Isolda Meuland於1240年出生在英國英格蘭。她於從1245年1月8日到1246年1月7日與Henry De Broughton在英國瓦維其可爾納普頓 奧 馮 希爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1271年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isolda Meuland于1240年出生在英国英格兰。她于从1245年1月8日到1246年1月7日与Henry De Broughton在英国瓦維其可爾納普頓 奧 馮 希爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1271年在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯頓享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: Meuland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Cornwall): habitational name from Medland in Hatherleigh (Devon). The placename derives from Old English mǣd ‘meadow’ + land ‘land’.

variants.name: Medlen
meanings: English and Cornish: variant of Medland with loss of final -d.
English and Cornish: habitational name from Medlyn in Wendron (Cornwall). The placename derives from Middle Cornish meth ‘middle’ + lyn ‘pool, pond’.

nameMeanings.name: Isolda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The name of the tragic mistress of Tristan in the Arthurian romances. There are several versions of the story. The main features are that the beautiful Isolde, an Irish princess, is betrothed to the aged King Mark of Cornwall. However, through accidentally drinking a magic potion, she and the young Cornish knight Tristan fall in love, with tragic consequences. The story has exercised a powerful hold on the European imagination. The name was relatively common in Britain in the Middle Ages, but is much rarer today.

en.lifeSummary: Isolda Meuland was born in 1240, in England, United Kingdom. She married Henry De Broughton from 8 January 1245 to 7 January 1246, in Napton on the Hill, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1271, in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Isolda Meuland est née en 1240, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Henry De Broughton du 8 janvier 1245 au 7 janvier 1246, à Napton on the Hill, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1271, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans.

Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1271 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Isolda Meulandは1240年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた。から1245年1月8日まで1246年1月7日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアナプトン オン ス ヒルでHenry De Broughtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1271年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isolda Meuland(은)는 1240년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1245년 1월 8일부터 1246년 1월 7일까지 영국 워윅실르 나프턴  테 힐에서 Henry De Broughton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1271년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Isolda Meuland nasceu em 1240, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Henry De Broughton de 8 de janeiro de 1245 a 7 de janeiro de 1246, em Napton on the Hill, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Isolda Meuland родилась в 1240 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry De Broughton с 8 января 1245 по 7 января 1246 в местности наптон он т хилл, варвиккшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1271 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год.
